StandX Perps HTTP API List ⚠️ Please note that the API responses below are for illustrative purposes only. Actual values are subject to change based on market conditions. https://perps.standx.com public endpoints Authorization Authorization: Bearer <your_jwt_token> Token Validity Some endpoints require body signature. Add the following headers to signed requests: x-request-sign-version: v1 x-request-id: <random_string> x-request-timestamp: <timestamp_in_milliseconds> x-request-signature: <your_body_signature> Authentication Guide new_order cancel_order x-session-id: <your_custom_session_id> Note that this session_id needs to be consistent with the session_id used in your ws-client. int decimal POST /api/new_order Note Order Response Stream Order Response Stream x-session-id Authentication Required Body Signature Required Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference side enum Reference order_type enum Reference qty decimal Order quantity time_in_force enum Reference reduce_only boolean true About reduce_only position qty - cumulative qty of all pending reduce_only orders Optional Parameters Parameter Type Description price decimal Order price (required for limit orders) cl_ord_id string Client order ID (auto-generated if omitted) margin_mode enum Reference leverage int Leverage value. Must match position tp_price decimal Take-profit trigger price. Creates a TP order after this order getting filled sl_price decimal Stop-loss trigger price. Creates a SL order after this order getting filled Request Example { "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "side" : "buy" , "order_type" : "limit" , "qty" : "0.1" , "price" : "50000" , "time_in_force" : "gtc" , "reduce_only" : false } Response Example { "code" : 0 , "message" : "success" , "request_id" : "xxx-xxx-xxx" } POST /api/cancel_order asynchronous Order Response Stream x-session-id Authentication Required Body Signature Required Parameters order_id cl_ord_id Parameter Type Description order_id int Order ID to cancel cl_ord_id string Client order ID to cancel Request Example { "order_id" : 2424844 } Response Example { "code" : 0 , "message" : "success" , "request_id" : "xxx-xxx-xxx" } POST /api/cancel_orders asynchronous Cancel Order Order Response Stream Authentication Required Body Signature Required Parameters order_id_list cl_ord_id_list Parameter Type Description order_id_list int[] Order IDs to cancel cl_ord_id_list string[] Client order IDs to cancel Request Example { "order_id_list" : [ 2424844 ] } Response Example { "code" : 0 , "message" : "success" , "request_id" : "xxx-xxx-xxx" } POST /api/change_leverage Authentication Required Body Signature Required Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference leverage int New leverage value Request Example { "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "leverage" : 10 } Response Example { "code" : 0 , "message" : "success" , "request_id" : "xxx-xxx-xxx" } POST /api/change_margin_mode Authentication Required Body Signature Required Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference margin_mode enum Reference Request Example { "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "margin_mode" : "cross" } Response Example { "code" : 0 , "message" : "success" , "request_id" : "xxx-xxx-xxx" } POST /api/transfer_margin Authentication Required Body Signature Required Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference amount_in decimal Amount to transfer Request Example { "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "amount_in" : "1000.0" } Response Example { "code" : 0 , "message" : "success" , "request_id" : "xxx-xxx-xxx" } Wallet Operation Use that guide for: POST /api/transfer_to_perps POST /api/transfer_to_spot POST /api/withdraw The EVM Highway transaction required after creating a withdraw request GET /api/query_order ⚠️ NOTE Order Response Stream Authentication Required Query Parameters order_id cl_ord_id Parameter Type Description order_id int Order ID to query cl_ord_id string Client order ID to query Response Example { "avail_locked" : "3.071880000" , "cl_ord_id" : "01K2BK4ZKQE0C308SRD39P8N9Z" , "closed_block" : -1 , "created_at" : "2025-08-11T03:35:25.559151Z" , "created_block" : -1 , "fill_avg_price" : "0" , "fill_qty" : "0" , "id" : 1820682 , "leverage" : "10" , "liq_id" : 0 , "margin" : "0" , "order_type" : "limit" , "payload" : null , "position_id" : 15 , "price" : "121900.00" , "qty" : "0.060" , "reduce_only" : false , "remark" : "" , "side" : "sell" , "source" : "user" , "status" : "open" , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "time_in_force" : "gtc" , "updated_at" : "2025-08-11T03:35:25.559151Z" , "user" : "bsc_0x..." } GET /api/query_orders Authentication Required Query Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference status enum Reference order_type enum Reference start string Start time in ISO 8601 format end string End time in ISO 8601 format last_id number Last order ID for pagination limit number Results limit (default: 100, max: 500) Response Example { "page_size" : 1 , "result" : [ { "avail_locked" : "3.071880000" , "cl_ord_id" : "01K2BK4ZKQE0C308SRD39P8N9Z" , "closed_block" : -1 , "created_at" : "2025-08-11T03:35:25.559151Z" , "created_block" : -1 , "fill_avg_price" : "0" , "fill_qty" : "0" , "id" : 1820682 , "leverage" : "10" , "liq_id" : 0 , "margin" : "0" , "order_type" : "limit" , "payload" : null , "position_id" : 15 , "price" : "121900.00" , "qty" : "0.060" , "reduce_only" : false , "remark" : "" , "side" : "sell" , "source" : "user" , "status" : "new" , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "time_in_force" : "gtc" , "updated_at" : "2025-08-11T03:35:25.559151Z" , "user" : "bsc_0x..." } ], "total" : 1 } GET /api/query_open_orders Authentication Required Query Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference limit number Results limit (default: 500, max: 1200) Response Example { "page_size" : 1 , "result" : [ { "avail_locked" : "3.071880000" , "cl_ord_id" : "01K2BK4ZKQE0C308SRD39P8N9Z" , "closed_block" : -1 , "created_at" : "2025-08-11T03:35:25.559151Z" , "created_block" : -1 , "fill_avg_price" : "0" , "fill_qty" : "0" , "id" : 1820682 , "leverage" : "10" , "liq_id" : 0 , "margin" : "0" , "order_type" : "limit" , "payload" : null , "position_id" : 15 , "price" : "121900.00" , "qty" : "0.060" , "reduce_only" : false , "remark" : "" , "side" : "sell" , "source" : "user" , "status" : "new" , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "time_in_force" : "gtc" , "updated_at" : "2025-08-11T03:35:25.559151Z" , "user" : "bsc_0x..." } ], "total" : 1 } GET /api/query_trades Authentication Required Query Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference last_id number Last trade ID for pagination side string Reference start string Start time in ISO 8601 format end string End time in ISO 8601 format limit number Results limit (default: 100, max: 500) Response Example { "page_size" : 1 , "result" : [ { "created_at" : "2025-08-11T03:36:19.352620Z" , "fee_asset" : "DUSD" , "fee_qty" : "0.121900" , "id" : 409870 , "order_id" : 1820682 , "pnl" : "1.62040" , "price" : "121900" , "qty" : "0.01" , "side" : "sell" , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "updated_at" : "2025-08-11T03:36:19.352620Z" , "user" : "bsc_0x..." , "value" : "1219.00" } ], "total" : 1 } GET /api/query_funding_history Returns the user’s funding payment/receipt history. Authentication Required Query Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference start string Start time in ISO 8601 format end string End time in ISO 8601 format last_id number Last funding transaction ID for pagination limit number Results limit Response Fields Field Type Description id int Funding transaction ID user string User identifier asset string Settlement asset (e.g., DUSD) symbol string Trading pair qty decimal Funding amount txn_type string Transaction type transact_time string Funding settlement time (ISO 8601) created_at string Record creation time (ISO 8601) updated_at string Record update time (ISO 8601) Response Example [ { "id" : 12345 , "user" : "bsc_0x..." , "asset" : "DUSD" , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "qty" : "-0.123456" , "txn_type" : "funding" , "transact_time" : "2025-08-11T08:00:00Z" , "created_at" : "2025-08-11T08:00:00.123456Z" , "updated_at" : "2025-08-11T08:00:00.123456Z" } ] GET /api/query_position_config Authentication Required Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference Response Example { "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "leverage" : 10 , "margin_mode" : "cross" } GET /api/query_positions Authentication Required Query Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference Response Example [ { "bankruptcy_price" : "109608.01" , "created_at" : "2025-08-10T09:05:50.265265Z" , "entry_price" : "121737.96" , "entry_value" : "114433.68240" , "holding_margin" : "11443.3682400" , "id" : 15 , "initial_margin" : "11443.36824" , "leverage" : "10" , "liq_price" : "112373.50" , "maint_margin" : "2860.30367500" , "margin_asset" : "DUSD" , "margin_mode" : "isolated" , "mark_price" : "121715.05" , "mmr" : "3.993223845366698695025800014" , "position_value" : "114412.14700" , "qty" : "0.940" , "realized_pnl" : "31.61532" , "status" : "open" , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "time" : "2025-08-11T03:41:40.922818Z" , "updated_at" : "2025-08-10T09:05:50.265265Z" , "upnl" : "-21.53540" , "user" : "bsc_0x..." } ] Endpoint /api/query_balance Method GET Authentication Description Response Fields Name Type Description isolated_balance decimal Isolated wallet total isolated_upnl decimal Isolated unrealized PnL cross_balance decimal Cross wallet free balance cross_margin decimal Cross margin used (executed positions only) cross_upnl decimal Cross unrealized PnL locked decimal Order lock (margin + fee), already includes safety factor b cross_available decimal cross_balance - cross_margin - locked + cross_upnl balance decimal Total account assets = cross_balance + isolated_balance upnl decimal Total unrealized PnL = cross_upnl + isolated_upnl equity decimal Account equity = balance + upnl pnl_freeze decimal 24h realized PnL (for display) Response Example { "isolated_balance" : "11443.3682400" , "isolated_upnl" : "-21.53540" , "cross_balance" : "1088575.259316737" , "cross_margin" : "2860.30367500" , "cross_upnl" : "31.61532" , "locked" : "0.000000000" , "cross_available" : "1085746.571" , "balance" : "1100018.627556737" , "upnl" : "10.07992" , "equity" : "1100028.707476657" , "pnl_freeze" : "31.61532" } Notes: cross_available GET /api/query_market_overview Returns a summary of all supported markets, including 24h volume, open interest, funding rates, and latest prices. Response Example { "summary" : { "open_interest_notional" : "122904802.996536" , "symbol_count" : 5 , "volume_quote_24h" : "560815382.03054878581315279005" }, "symbols" : [ { "base" : "BTC" , "funding_rate" : "-0.00000999" , "last_price" : "72681.45" , "mark_price" : "72697.39" , "open_interest" : "1154.4344" , "open_interest_notional" : "83924367.806216" , "price_change_pct" : 0.945710770122798 , "quote" : "DUSD" , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "time" : "2026-04-10T16:29:17.400234Z" , "volume_24h" : "6202.664199999995616963133214" , "volume_quote_24h" : "447190753.290538787841796875" }, { "base" : "ETH" , "funding_rate" : "-0.00000157" , "last_price" : "2238.30" , "mark_price" : "2238.7" , "open_interest" : "16586.2040" , "open_interest_notional" : "37131534.89480" , "price_change_pct" : 1.33991218143135 , "quote" : "DUSD" , "symbol" : "ETH-USD" , "time" : "2026-04-10T16:29:17.400234Z" , "volume_24h" : "39606.743999999984225723892442" , "volume_quote_24h" : "87325756.45479999482631683348" } ] } Response Fields summary Field Type Description open_interest_notional decimal Total open interest notional across markets symbol_count int Number of supported trading pairs volume_quote_24h decimal Total 24h trading volume in quote asset symbols[] Field Type Description base string Base asset (e.g., BTC, ETH) quote string Quote asset (e.g., DUSD) symbol string Trading pair identifier last_price decimal Last traded price mark_price decimal Current mark price funding_rate decimal Current funding rate open_interest decimal Open interest in base asset open_interest_notional decimal Open interest in quote asset price_change_pct float 24h price change percentage volume_24h decimal 24h volume in base asset volume_quote_24h decimal 24h volume in quote asset time string Timestamp (ISO 8601) GET /api/query_symbol_info Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference Response Example [ { "base_asset" : "BTC" , "base_decimals" : 9 , "created_at" : "2025-07-10T05:15:32.089568Z" , "def_leverage" : "10" , "depth_ticks" : "0.01,0.1,1" , "enabled" : true , "maker_fee" : "0.0001" , "max_leverage" : "20" , "max_open_orders" : "100" , "max_order_qty" : "100" , "max_position_size" : "1000" , "min_order_qty" : "0.0001" , "price_cap_ratio" : "0.3" , "price_floor_ratio" : "0.3" , "price_tick_decimals" : 2 , "qty_tick_decimals" : 4 , "quote_asset" : "DUSD" , "quote_decimals" : 9 , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "taker_fee" : "0.0004" , "updated_at" : "2025-07-10T05:15:32.089568Z" } ] GET /api/query_symbol_market Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference Response Example { "base" : "BTC" , "funding_rate" : "0.00010000" , "high_price_24h" : "122164.08" , "index_price" : "121601.158461" , "last_price" : "121599.94" , "low_price_24h" : "114098.44" , "mark_price" : "121602.43" , "mid_price" : "121599.99" , "next_funding_time" : "2025-08-11T08:00:00Z" , "open_interest" : "15.948" , "quote" : "DUSD" , "spread" : [ "121599.94" , "121600.04" ], "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "time" : "2025-08-11T03:44:40.922233Z" , "volume_24h" : "9030.51800000000002509" } GET /api/query_symbol_price Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference Response Example { "base" : "BTC" , "index_price" : "121601.158461" , "last_price" : "121599.94" , "mark_price" : "121602.43" , "mid_price" : "121599.99" , "quote" : "DUSD" , "spread_ask" : "121600.04" , "spread_bid" : "121599.94" , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "time" : "2025-08-11T03:44:40.922233Z" } Note last_price mid_price spread_ask spread_bid GET /api/query_depth_book ⚠️ Note: The sequence of price levels in the asks and bids arrays is not guaranteed. Please implement local sorting on the client side based on your specific requirements. Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference Response Example { "asks" : [ [ "121895.81" , "0.843" ], [ "121896.11" , "0.96" ] ], "bids" : [ [ "121884.01" , "0.001" ], [ "121884.31" , "0.001" ] ], "symbol" : "BTC-USD" } GET /api/query_recent_trades Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference Response Example [ { "is_buyer_taker" : true , "price" : "121720.18" , "qty" : "0.01" , "quote_qty" : "1217.2018" , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "time" : "2025-08-11T03:48:47.086505Z" }, { "is_buyer_taker" : true , "price" : "121720.18" , "qty" : "0.01" , "quote_qty" : "1217.2018" , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "time" : "2025-08-11T03:48:46.850415Z" } ] GET /api/query_funding_rates Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference start_time int Start time in milliseconds end_time int End time in milliseconds Response Example [ { "id" : 1 , "symbol" : "BTC-USD" , "funding_rate" : "0.0001" , "index_price" : "121601.158461" , "mark_price" : "121602.43" , "premium" : "0.0001" , "time" : "2025-08-11T03:48:47.086505Z" , "created_at" : "2025-08-11T03:48:47.086505Z" , "updated_at" : "2025-08-11T03:48:47.086505Z" } ] GET /api/kline/time Response Example 1620000000 GET /api/kline/history Required Parameters Parameter Type Description symbol string Reference from u64 Unix timestamp in seconds to u64 Unix timestamp in seconds resolution enum Reference Optional Parameters Parameter Type Description countback u64 The required amount of bars to load Response Example { "s" : "ok" , "t" : [ 1754897028 , 1754897031 ], "c" : [ 121897.95 , 121903.04 ], "o" : [ 121896.02 , 121898.05 ], "h" : [ 121897.95 , 121903.15 ], "l" : [ 121895.92 , 121898.05 ], "v" : [ 0.09 , 10.542 ] } GET /api/health Response OK GET https://geo.standx.com/v1/region Response Example { "systemTime" : 1761970177865 , "region" : "jp" } API Reference
